title: Bootstrap agent instructions and diagnostics
summary: EVE now installs versioned repository guidance for coding agents and diagnoses instruction, repository, MCP, and Snapshot setup.
userVisibleChange: Running eve init now configures AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md, with explicit instructions management and eve doctor commands for maintenance.

risks.title: Doctor detects supported default MCP configuration files but intentionally does not perform a live MCP handshake.

decisions.title: Use one provider-neutral canonical template for AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md while preserving all content outside managed markers.
